pub use crate::session::cluster::error::AttachError;
pub mod program {
pub use crate::global::program::Projectable;
pub use crate::global::role_program::{RoleProgram, project};
pub mod ids {
pub use crate::session::types::SessionId;
pub mod tap {
pub use crate::observe::core::{Evidence, TapEvent, TapPort};
pub use crate::observe::ids::{ ENDPOINT_RECV, ENDPOINT_SEND, ENDPOINT_SESSION, LANE_ACQUIRE, LANE_RELEASE, RESOLVER_AUDIT, RESOLVER_AUDIT_DEFER, RESOLVER_REPLAY_EVENT, RESOLVER_REPLAY_EVENT_EXT, ROUTE_ARM_SELECTION, TRANSPORT_FAULT, TRANSPORT_FAULT_CAPACITY, TRANSPORT_FAULT_DEADLINE, TRANSPORT_FAULT_FAILED, TRANSPORT_FAULT_OFFLINE, TRANSPORT_FRAME, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_LABEL, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_LANE, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_PEER_ROLE, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_SESSION, TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_SOURCE_ROLE, };
pub mod resolver {
pub use crate::session::cluster::core::{ DecisionArm, DecisionResolution, ResolverError, ResolverRef, };
pub mod wire {
pub use crate::transport::wire::{CodecError, Payload, WireEncode, WirePayload};
pub mod transport {
pub use crate::transport::{ FrameHeader, FrameLabel, Outgoing, PortOpen, ReceivedFrame, Transport, TransportError, };
pub struct SessionKit<'cfg, T> where T: crate::transport::Transport + 'cfg, {
pub struct SessionKitStorage<'cfg, T> where T: crate::transport::Transport + 'cfg, {
pub struct RendezvousKit<'kit, 'cfg, T> where T: crate::transport::Transport + 'cfg, {
pub struct SessionRendezvousKit<'kit, 'cfg, T> where T: crate::transport::Transport + 'cfg, {
pub struct RoleKit<'kit, 'cfg, 'prog, const ROLE: u8, T> where T: crate::transport::Transport + 'cfg, {
pub struct SessionRoleKit<'kit, 'cfg, 'prog, const ROLE: u8, T> where T: crate::transport::Transport + 'cfg, {
SessionKitStorage::uninit pub const fn uninit() -> Self {
SessionKitStorage::init pub fn init(&mut self) -> &SessionKit<'cfg, T> {
SessionKit::rendezvous pub fn rendezvous( &self, slab: &'cfg mut [u8], transport: T, ) -> Result<RendezvousKit<'_, 'cfg, T>, AttachError> {
RendezvousKit::session pub fn session( &self, sid: crate::runtime::ids::SessionId, ) -> SessionRendezvousKit<'kit, 'cfg, T> {
RendezvousKit::tap pub fn tap(&self) -> crate::runtime::tap::TapPort<'_> {
RendezvousKit::role pub fn role<'prog, const ROLE: u8>( &self, program: &'prog crate::runtime::program::RoleProgram<ROLE>, ) -> RoleKit<'kit, 'cfg, 'prog, ROLE, T> {
SessionRendezvousKit::role pub fn role<'prog, const ROLE: u8>( &self, program: &'prog crate::runtime::program::RoleProgram<ROLE>, ) -> SessionRoleKit<'kit, 'cfg, 'prog, ROLE, T> {
SessionRoleKit::enter pub fn enter(self) -> Result<crate::Endpoint<'kit, ROLE>, AttachError> {
RoleKit::set_resolver pub fn set_resolver<const RESOLVER: u16>( &self, resolver: crate::runtime::resolver::ResolverRef<'cfg, RESOLVER>, ) -> Result<(), crate::runtime::resolver::ResolverError> {
pub struct SessionId(u32);
SessionId::new pub const fn new(id: u32) -> Self {
SessionId::raw pub const fn raw(self) -> u32 {
pub enum DecisionArm {
pub enum DecisionResolution {
pub struct ResolverError {
ResolverError::reject pub fn reject() -> Self {
pub struct ResolverRef<'cfg, const RESOLVER_ID: u16> {
ResolverRef::decision_state pub fn decision_state<S: 'cfg>( state: &'cfg S, resolver: fn(&S) -> Result<DecisionResolution, ResolverError>, ) -> Self {
ResolverRef::evaluate pub fn evaluate(self) -> Result<DecisionResolution, ResolverError> {
pub struct AttachError {
pub struct TapPort<'a> {
pub struct TapEvent {
pub struct Evidence {
Evidence::kind pub const fn kind(self) -> u16 {
Evidence::reason pub const fn reason(self) -> u8 {
Evidence::input pub const fn input(self) -> [u32; 4] {
TapEvent::ts pub const fn ts(self) -> u32 {
TapEvent::id pub const fn id(self) -> u16 {
TapEvent::causal_key pub const fn causal_key(self) -> u16 {
TapEvent::arg0 pub const fn arg0(self) -> u32 {
TapEvent::arg1 pub const fn arg1(self) -> u32 {
TapEvent::evidence pub const fn evidence(self) -> Evidence {
pub const ENDPOINT_SEND: u16 = 0x0202;
pub const ENDPOINT_RECV: u16 = 0x0203;
pub const ENDPOINT_SESSION: u16 = 0x0204;
pub const TRANSPORT_MISMATCH: u16 = 0x0205;
pub const TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_SESSION: u8 = 1;
pub const TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_LANE: u8 = 2;
pub const TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_SOURCE_ROLE: u8 = 3;
pub const TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_PEER_ROLE: u8 = 4;
pub const TRANSPORT_MISMATCH_LABEL: u8 = 5;
pub const TRANSPORT_FRAME: u16 = 0x0206;
pub const TRANSPORT_FAULT: u16 = 0x0207;
pub const TRANSPORT_FAULT_OFFLINE: u8 = 1;
pub const TRANSPORT_FAULT_DEADLINE: u8 = 2;
pub const TRANSPORT_FAULT_CAPACITY: u8 = 3;
pub const TRANSPORT_FAULT_FAILED: u8 = 4;
pub const LANE_ACQUIRE: u16 = 0x0210;
pub const LANE_RELEASE: u16 = 0x0211;
pub const ROUTE_ARM_SELECTION: u16 = 0x0221;
pub const RESOLVER_AUDIT: u16 = 0x0407;
pub const RESOLVER_REPLAY_EVENT: u16 = 0x0408;
pub const RESOLVER_REPLAY_EVENT_EXT: u16 = 0x0409;
pub const RESOLVER_AUDIT_DEFER: u16 = 0x040A;
pub struct Outgoing<'f> {
Outgoing::frame_label pub const fn frame_label(&self) -> FrameLabel {
Outgoing::target_role pub const fn target_role(&self) -> u8 {
Outgoing::lane pub const fn lane(&self) -> u8 {
Outgoing::payload pub const fn payload(&self) -> Payload<'f> {
pub enum TransportError {
pub struct FrameHeader([u8; 8]);
FrameHeader::from_bytes pub const fn from_bytes(bytes: [u8; 8]) -> Self {
FrameHeader::bytes pub const fn bytes(self) -> [u8; 8] {
pub struct ReceivedFrame<'f> {
ReceivedFrame::deterministic pub const fn deterministic(payload: Payload<'f>) -> Self {
ReceivedFrame::framed pub const fn framed(header: FrameHeader, payload: Payload<'f>) -> Self {
ReceivedFrame::payload pub const fn payload(self) -> Payload<'f> {
pub struct PortOpen {
PortOpen::local_role pub const fn local_role(self) -> u8 {
PortOpen::session_id pub const fn session_id(self) -> crate::session::types::SessionId {
PortOpen::lane pub const fn lane(self) -> u8 {
pub trait Transport {
Transport::Tx type Tx<'a>: 'a where Self: 'a;
Transport::Rx type Rx<'a>: 'a where Self: 'a;
Transport::open fn open<'a>(&'a self, port: PortOpen) -> (Self::Tx<'a>, Self::Rx<'a>);
Transport::poll_send fn poll_send<'a, 'f>( &self, tx: &'a mut Self::Tx<'a>, outgoing: Outgoing<'f>, cx: &mut Context<'_>, ) -> Poll<Result<(), TransportError>> where 'a: 'f;
Transport::cancel_send fn cancel_send<'a>(&self, tx: &'a mut Self::Tx<'a>);
Transport::poll_recv fn poll_recv<'a>( &'a self, rx: &'a mut Self::Rx<'a>, cx: &mut Context<'_>, ) -> Poll<Result<ReceivedFrame<'a>, TransportError>>;
Transport::requeue fn requeue<'a>(&self, rx: &mut Self::Rx<'a>) -> Result<(), TransportError>;
pub struct FrameLabel(u8);
FrameLabel::raw pub const fn raw(self) -> u8 {
pub enum CodecError {
pub trait WireEncode {
WireEncode::encode_into fn encode_into(&self, out: &mut [u8]) -> Result<usize, CodecError>;
pub trait WirePayload {
WirePayload::Decoded type Decoded<'a>;
WirePayload::validate_payload fn validate_payload(input: Payload<'_>) -> Result<(), CodecError>;
WirePayload::decode_validated_payload fn decode_validated_payload<'a>(input: Payload<'a>) -> Self::Decoded<'a>;
WirePayload::decode_payload fn decode_payload<'a>(input: Payload<'a>) -> Result<Self::Decoded<'a>, CodecError> {
pub struct Payload<'a> {
Payload::new pub const fn new(data: &'a [u8]) -> Self {
Payload::as_bytes pub fn as_bytes(&self) -> &'a [u8] {
